commentaries.author: Hippolytus of Rome
commentaries.content: And this, (the Naassene) says, is what is declared in Scripture, "The just will fall seven times, and rise again."

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: Thus teaches who forbids your refusing to bring back even your brother's cattle, if you find them astray in the road; much more should you bring back your erring brother to himself. He commands you to forgive your brother, should he trespass against you even "seven times."
